site.title: Calma Men's Massage, Salon & Spa | Seef, Bahrain
site.description: Men's massage, salon & spa in Seef, Bahrain. Spanish-inspired calm, expertly delivered. Book online or WhatsApp us.
site.og_description: Men's massage, salon & spa in Seef, Bahrain. 4.9★ on Fresha · 1,390+ reviews.

hero.sub: A men-only sanctuary for massage, salon and spa. Spanish-inspired calm, expertly delivered, kept open until midnight.

space.lead: Warm stone, walnut wood, low amber light. The therapists trained in the Spanish tradition — slow, deliberate, unhurried. You arrive carrying the day. You leave lighter.
space.photo_alt: Calma salon with cream barber chairs and arched mirrors
space.copy_lead: Three treatment rooms, a copper-ceiling massage suite, a hammam for Moroccan bath, and a five-chair barber salon — all under one quiet roof.

gallery.lead: Six rooms under one quiet roof — a hammam, three treatment suites, a five-chair salon, and a vanity for facials. Built to be heard as little as possible.

signature.lead: What men ask for most often, and what we do best. Each one bookable on its own, or built into a longer session.
signature.card1_blurb: Traditional cupping draws blood to the surface, releasing deep muscle tension and improving circulation.
signature.card2_blurb: Deep-tissue work focused on legs, shoulders and lower back. Built for men who train hard.
signature.card3_blurb: French marine formulas, applied by trained hands. Cleaner pores, better texture in 45 minutes.

services_section.lead: Thirty treatments across massage, spa and salon — every price in BHD, every duration transparent. Tap a row to book the slot you want.
services_section.bottom_note: Bookable on Fresha. Walk-ins welcome — we'll fit you in around the schedule. For group bookings or vouchers, message us directly.

reviews.quote: Trusted enough that men cross town for it — and quiet enough that they keep coming back.

thalgo.headline: French marine, applied by trained hands.
thalgo.copy: Calma facials use Thalgo formulas — the same line you'd find in spa-hotels along the Côte d'Azur. The products are quietly stocked at reception for guests who ask.

team_section.lead: Eight barbers and therapists, each with their own following on Fresha. Pick the one you trust, or let us match you to a free slot.

visit.lead: Building 2131, Road 3640, Seef. Three minutes from City Centre Bahrain. Wheelchair accessible, parking outside the door.

privacy.description: How Calma collects and uses your information.
